all.en: Subject: Mandatory Action — Payroll System Migration Scheduled for January 8th
all.zh: 主旨：必要行動 — 薪資系統升級訂於 1 月 8 日進行

all.en: Dear Colleagues,
all.zh: 親愛的同仁，

all.en: The Information Technology team is rolling out a major payroll platform upgrade.
all.zh: 資訊科技團隊將推行重大薪資平台升級。

all.en: The current PayLink system will be retired effective the second pay cycle of January.
all.zh: 現行 PayLink 系統將於 1 月第二期薪資週期起停用。

all.en: It will be replaced by the new PayWave platform across all regional entities.
all.zh: 將由新平台 PayWave 接替，適用於全集團各區據點。

all.en: PayWave introduces enhanced security, mobile access, and self-service capabilities.
all.zh: PayWave 提供更強的資安防護、行動存取與自助服務功能。

all.en: All employees must complete personal data re-verification by January 5th.
all.zh: 全體員工須於 1 月 5 日前完成個人資料重新驗證。

all.en: This is a regulatory requirement, not an optional task.
all.zh: 此為法規要求事項，並非可選任務。

all.en: Re-verification protects payroll continuity and prevents direct deposit interruption.
all.zh: 重新驗證可保障薪資作業連續性並避免直撥薪資中斷。

all.en: Please follow the steps outlined in the migration playbook below.
all.zh: 敬請依照下方升級指引手冊所列步驟辦理。

all.en: Step one: log in to portal.paywave.globex.com using your single sign-on credentials.
all.zh: 步驟一：以單一登入帳號登入 portal.paywave.globex.com。

all.en: Step two: confirm your legal name, date of birth, and tax identification number.
all.zh: 步驟二：確認法定姓名、出生日期及稅籍編號。

all.en: Step three: validate your direct deposit bank account and routing number.
all.zh: 步驟三：核對直撥薪資銀行帳號及銀行匯款代碼。

all.en: Step four: review your federal and state withholding elections for accuracy.
all.zh: 步驟四：審視聯邦及州稅扣繳設定是否正確。

all.en: Step five: re-confirm your beneficiary designations for retirement and life insurance.
all.zh: 步驟五：再次確認退休金及壽險受益人之指定。

all.en: Step six: enable multi-factor authentication using an authenticator app.
all.zh: 步驟六：透過驗證程式啟用多因素認證。

all.en: Multi-factor authentication is mandatory for all payroll-related logins.
all.zh: 薪資相關之登入皆強制要求多因素認證。

all.en: We recommend Authy or Microsoft Authenticator for ease of use.
all.zh: 建議使用 Authy 或 Microsoft Authenticator 以便操作。

all.en: SMS-based codes are accepted but considered a lower security tier.
all.zh: 簡訊驗證碼可接受，但其安全等級較低。

all.en: If you change your phone number, please update it within seven calendar days.
all.zh: 如有變更手機號碼，請於七個曆日內更新。

all.en: The migration window runs from January 6th midnight to January 8th 6 AM.
all.zh: 升級時段自 1 月 6 日午夜至 1 月 8 日上午 6 點。

all.en: During this window, both PayLink and PayWave will be temporarily offline.
all.zh: 該時段內 PayLink 與 PayWave 將暫停服務。

all.en: No payroll changes can be processed until the system comes back online.
all.zh: 系統恢復前無法處理任何薪資異動。

all.en: Please plan any urgent payroll requests around this maintenance schedule.
all.zh: 請依此維護時程安排任何緊急薪資請求。

all.en: Existing pay stubs from the past seven years will be archived in PayWave.
all.zh: 過去七年之薪資單將封存於 PayWave 中。

all.en: Older records can be requested through the HR archive desk by ticket.
all.zh: 更舊紀錄可向人資封存窗口開單申請。

all.en: Please download any pay stubs you may need for loan applications in advance.
all.zh: 如有貸款用途之薪資單需求，敬請事先下載備用。

all.en: Banks generally require at least three recent pay stubs for verification.
all.zh: 銀行通常要求至少三期最近薪資單以供驗證。

all.en: Tax forms from prior years will remain accessible in the legacy archive portal.
all.zh: 歷年稅務表件仍可於舊版封存入口網站查閱。

all.en: The legacy archive portal will be kept online until December next year.
all.zh: 舊版封存入口網站將維運至明年 12 月。

all.en: Mobile access is a key feature of the new platform.
all.zh: 行動存取為新平台之重點功能。

all.en: Download the PayWave mobile application from your official corporate app store.
all.zh: 請至公司官方應用程式商店下載 PayWave 行動應用程式。

all.en: Personal devices must be enrolled in the mobile device management program.
all.zh: 個人裝置須加入行動裝置管理計畫方可使用。

all.en: Unenrolled devices cannot access payroll information for compliance reasons.
all.zh: 基於合規考量，未加入計畫之裝置無法存取薪資資料。

all.en: For enrollment assistance, please visit the IT walk-up help desk on floor four.
all.zh: 如需協助加入，請至 4 樓資訊服務人工窗口洽詢。

all.en: Walk-up support is available Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 5 PM.
all.zh: 人工窗口服務時間為週一至週五上午 9 點至下午 5 點。

all.en: Remote employees may schedule a virtual support session via the IT portal.
all.zh: 遠距同仁可透過資訊入口網站預約線上協助時段。

all.en: Estimated session length is twenty minutes per employee.
all.zh: 每位員工預估協助時間為二十分鐘。

all.en: After re-verification, you will receive a confirmation email within one hour.
all.zh: 完成重新驗證後，您將於一小時內收到確認電子郵件。

all.en: Save this email as proof of completion for audit purposes.
all.zh: 請保留該郵件以利稽核時佐證完成。

all.en: Employees who miss the deadline risk delayed January 15th payroll deposits.
all.zh: 未於期限內完成者，1 月 15 日薪資撥款恐受延誤。

all.en: Late completion will be processed in the next available payroll cycle.
all.zh: 逾期完成者將於下一可用薪資週期一併處理。

all.en: The IT and HR teams jointly oversee the migration to ensure data integrity.
all.zh: 資訊與人資團隊將共同督導升級作業以確保資料完整性。

all.en: Audit logs will track every change made during the migration window.
all.zh: 升級時段內所有異動將留存稽核日誌。

all.en: Any phishing attempt referencing the migration should be reported immediately.
all.zh: 凡涉及此次升級之釣魚攻擊請立即通報。

all.en: Legitimate emails will originate from no-reply@paywave.globex.com only.
all.zh: 正式郵件僅自 no-reply@paywave.globex.com 寄出。

all.en: Never click links from unfamiliar senders requesting login credentials.
all.zh: 切勿點擊不明寄件人索取登入資訊之連結。

all.en: Report suspicious activity to the security operations center via Spotify Slack.
all.zh: 可疑活動請透過 Slack 通報資安維運中心。

all.en: A comprehensive FAQ document is available on the intranet under HR Resources.
all.zh: 完整常見問題文件已置於內部網站之人資資源區。

all.en: The FAQ will be updated continuously based on questions received.
all.zh: 常見問題將依收到之疑問持續更新。

all.en: Town hall sessions are scheduled for December 18th and December 22nd.
all.zh: 全員大會時段排定於 12 月 18 日及 12 月 22 日。

all.en: Both sessions will be recorded and posted within twenty-four hours.
all.zh: 兩場大會皆將錄影並於二十四小時內上線。

all.en: We sincerely appreciate everyone's cooperation during this critical transition.
all.zh: 對於各位於此關鍵轉換期之配合，謹致由衷感謝。

all.en: If you encounter unexpected issues, please reach out without delay.
all.zh: 如遇非預期問題，敬請即時通報。

all.en: Warm regards, Victor Alvarez, Chief Information Officer, IT Operations Division
all.zh: 謹致問候，資訊維運處資訊長 Victor Alvarez
